Name: EXAMPLE_EMAIL_TEMPLATEPARAMETERS
Description:
EXAMPLE_EMAIL_TEMPLATEPARAMETERS

This template provides an illustration of utilizing SQL_CLR to send emails and passing parameters, although it should be noted that this process is not fully functional.

Within the stored procedure Prescript_Example_SendTemplateEmailWithParameters, the clr_TemplateEmail is employed and email_AddTemplateParameter use to set params. Note that the PostDeploy script also creates the email template used in the prescript - this will give you a good starting point for customizing the template to suit your needs.
Author: Josh
